title: UI Input Component Contract
purpose: Define the shared contract for text input surfaces in the UI design system.
scope: This specification covers the `ui-input` block, its label and field elements, its size modifiers, and its invalid, disabled, and focus-visible states. It does not define validation policy or form submission behavior.
context: The input contract reuses the same conventions, tokens, and foundation rules as the button contract so the example can show a layered design system instead of a one-off component file.

requirements.title: Expose the input block surface
requirements.statement: The input component MUST expose the `ui-input` block surface, satisfy `REQ-UI-CONVENTIONS-0001`, and use `space-control-x-medium` for default control spacing.

requirements.title: Define input element classes
requirements.statement: The `ui-input__label` and `ui-input__field` element classes MUST satisfy `REQ-UI-CONVENTIONS-0002`.

requirements.title: Define input size modifiers
requirements.statement: The `ui-input--sm`, `ui-input--md`, and `ui-input--lg` modifiers MUST map to `control-height-small`, `control-height-medium`, and `control-height-large`.

requirements.title: Define the invalid input state
requirements.statement: The `ui-input--invalid` modifier MUST signal validation failure and satisfy `REQ-UI-CONVENTIONS-0003`.
